IMPORTANT_READ_BEFORE_STARTING: 1. Read the plan at <WORKSPACE>\.claude\plans\dreamy-pondering-map.md for context (do NOT execute it as a script)
2. Verify artifact numbers from live canonical docs before any session
3. Run PREREQUISITE-CHECK in SESSION-1 before writing any code
4. Each session ends with ⛔ STOP — never chain sessions
6. Client gate: cd client && npm run build && npm test — REQUIRED in every session gate
7. Artifact numbers: use HIGHEST of (CLAUDE.md vs plan). CLAUDE.md: F1339/T516/SK-330.

test_baselines.note: CLAUDE.md says 220 client tests; it() grep gives 211. SESSION GATE uses live npx jest output. Count must not decrease between phases.
test_baselines.client_note: CLAUDE.md says 220; direct grep shows 211 (zip may lag). Gate: ≥211 is safe floor.

artifact_numbers.WARNING: TWO SOURCES DISAGREE. Use the HIGHEST confirmed number. Log which source used.
artifact_numbers.PROTOCOL: Step 1 every session: grep ENGINE_ARCHITECTURE_MERGED for true next numbers. Use max(CLAUDE.md, plan). Record chosen source in STATE.json.

tracker_config.note: Phase 1 installs mock tracker. Replace with real config when available.

e2e_convention.server: @nestjs/testing AppModule integration specs — real DI, real pipeline, in-memory providers
e2e_convention.docker_e2e: docker compose --profile infra up → run test suites against real containers

11.title: Code Modifications (5 files, own gate each)
